rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On The Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF ALLISON LESHEFSKY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On The Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff demonstrates that there is no triable issue of material fact regarding the seventh cause of action for nuisance in the Cross-Complaint. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF ALLISON LESHEFSKY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs On Appeal is GRANTED. Plaintiff's counsel is awarded $37,757.20 in attorney's fees and costs pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 425.16(c)(1). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is CONTINUED to March 26, 2020, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B for Plaintiff Roberto Sanchez and Juanita Sanchez to provide courtesy copies of their opposition. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Cole Hardwares Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment On Sunset Scavengers And Lylian Sifuentes Cross-Complaints
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT COLE HARDWARE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Cole Hardwares Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment On Sunset Scavengers And Lylian Sifuentes Cross-Complaints is CONTINUED to March 26, 2020, on its own motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT BROADWELL, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is GRANTED under CCP § 437c, as there is no evidence which establishes a triable issue of material fact relating to Defendant Broadwell. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CAROLYN GAGE VS. SHERWOOD EQUITY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF CAROLYN GAGE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to state "new or different facts, circumstances, or law" pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1008(a). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DANNY WILLIAMS VS. REVERSE MORTGAGE SOLUTIONS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT REVERSE MORTGAGE SOLUTIONS, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. On February 19, 2020, Plaintiff filed a Request for Dismissal as to the entire action. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DANNY WILLIAMS VS. REVERSE MORTGAGE SOLUTIONS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 5, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT REVERSE MORTGAGE SOLUTIONS, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. On February 19, 2020, Plaintiff filed a Request for Dismissal as to the entire action. =(501/CFH)
